title: Cobblemon Gamma
description: Pokemon Cobblemon Pack - QoL and Performance mods! The server included in the modpack has Raids, Gyms, Mega Evolution, Tera, Alpha Bosses, Paradox, Legendary Pokemon, GTS and more!
body:
# 🚀 Join Cobblemon Gamma Today
![a](https://mcmodels.net/_ipx/_/https://api.mcmodels.net/storage/product-images/15814/01KGC8MS54KQBKGA57J4PDFRV3.jpg)

If you love Minecraft + Pokémon, this is where your journey truly begins.
Cobblemon Gamma is an actively developed multiplayer world, not yet fully completed, built for players who want real progression, evolving systems, and a server that already feels alive.

🎮 Download the modpack → Hit Multiplayer → Join `play.cobblemongamma.com`

Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/ZfzyqXCp62) to become part of the community.

## 🌎 What Makes C. Gamma Different?

- Real progression systems
- Active playerbase
- Constant updates and improvements
- Features that actually connect together

## CORE FEATURES:
🧬 Complete Cobblemon Experience
✅ Mega Showdown battles
🐉 Raid Dens with powerful encounters
💥 Alpha Pokémon & Boss fights
✨ Hidden Ability spawns
🎯 Catch Combo system for chaining hunts
🔎 Hunts & tracking systems

🏆 Trading & Multiplayer Systems
🔁 Wondertrade system
📦 GTS for Pokémon AND items
🎁 Vote Rewards
🎒 Starter Kit to begin your journey

🌍 Exploration & World Features
🌿 Rustling Spots for dynamic encounters
📦 PokéLoot scattered across the world
🧸 Collectible Poké Plushies
⚔️ NPC Trainers across all regions

💰 Progression & Utility
📚 TMs, TRs & Tutor Moves fully available
🌱 Per-player loot system
🛠️ Tree Timber for faster resource gathering
🛡️ Land claim system to protect your builds

⚡ Advanced Gameplay Systems
💥 ZA Megas enabled
👑 Boss system with rewards
🎯 Balanced progression systems
📈 Designed for long-term play, not short sessions

🛠 Quality of Life
🔧 Optimized performance
🎮 Smooth multiplayer experience
📊 Systems designed to reduce grind frustration
🌟 Frequent updates and improvements

Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/ZfzyqXCp62) to become part of Cobblemon Gamma!

![](https://mcmodels.net/_ipx/_/https://api.mcmodels.net/storage/product-images/15814/01KGC8MS56Z10Y8AHWYE6NY40J.jpg)
